name: Cyreni's Razors
inspire:
Inspire a number of friendly fighters equal to the battle round at the beginning of each combat phase.

UNINSPIRE
At the start of the round, Uninspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: Deadly Riposte
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack that targeted a friendly Thrall ({icon:minion}).
reactions.flavorText: The eyeless Namarti fight with an eerie, deadly grace.
reactions.rulesText: That Thrall's weapons have Cleave ({icon:cleave}) and Ensnare ({icon:ensnare}) during the next turn while that enemy fighter is the target of an Attack.

reactions.name: Phantasmal Ink
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack that targeted a friendly Cephanyr.
reactions.flavorText: Cephanyr is well versed at escaping in a burst of black ink.
reactions.rulesText: Push Cephanyr a number of hexes equal to the battle round.

abilities.name: Hammertide
abilities.rulesText: You can use this ability if your leader ({icon:leader}) is on the battlefield and has no Charge tokens. Draw a straight line from your leader's ({icon:leader}) hex that passes through the centre of an adjacent hex and goes all the way to the edge of the battlefield. Inflict 1 damage on the first enemy fighter that line crosses and give that fighter a Stagger token. The line ends if it touches a blocked hex.

abilities.name: Soul Harvest
abilities.flavorText: The Idoneth seek out strong souls to sustain their people - and it is never wise to catch their eye…
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick an Inspired enemy fighter. Then your opponent must pick one of the following: Uninspire that fighter, or you can draw Power cards equal to the battle round. You can only use this ability once per game.
